title: Lamb Tagine with Sweet and Crispy Toppings
description: A hearty North African-inspired stew featuring tender lamb, sweet and crispy toppings, and an aromatic blend of spices.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the Algerian spice blend, sweet potatoes, and 1 cup of water to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2-1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the sweet potatoes are cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the crispy flatbread in the oven for an additional 5 minutes, or until crispy.
To assemble, place a portion of the lamb mixture onto a plate or bowl.
Top with a few slices of green olives, some chopped parsley, and a piece of crispy flatbread.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
